sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_correlation (id UInt32, value1 Float64, value2 Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_correlation (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 10.5, 20.3), (2, 15.2, 25.7), (3, 12.8, 22.4), (4, 9.6, 19.8);
UPDATE test_correlation SET value2 = value2 + 5 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, corr(value1, value2) as correlation FROM test_correlation GROUP BY id;
